articles.title: Donovan not reading into Reinsdorf's endorsement
articles.original_title: Donovan not reading into Reinsdorf's endorsement
articles.summary: Bulls coach Billy Donovan, who has yet to decide on his future with the team, appreciated team president and CEO Michael Reinsdorf's endorsement of him but said he understood "everybody's got to look out for what is best for the Bulls."
